## [03:04 - 04:08]

you know, break out how to enhance your data. So the tracking trinity, where I cover the browser pixel, the server pixel, can be conversion API, and offline conversions, and then enhance reporting, which I call the attribution trinity, looking at data from Facebook, Google Analytics and Shopify. And by the end of that, you should have a well rounded view. Now, it's not going to solve 100% of problems for everyone. But for everyone, it should take you far closer to your goal, because you'll have a few differences in how you set up your campaigns, how you set up your attribution and tracking and things like that.
